description: dev-workflows plugin hooks — completion notification, git context injection on impl:/vuln:/upgrade: prompts, and test-run notification.

_notes.PostToolUse_matcher: Claude Code supports a 'matcher' field (e.g. matcher: 'Bash') to restrict PostToolUse hooks to specific tools. Copilot CLI does not support matchers — test-notify.sh fires on every tool use. The script must be fast and exit 0 quickly for non-Bash invocations.
